planned_vs_actual.notes: Vite 6 + React 19 + TS + Tailwind 3 + vite-plugin-pwa, dep install clean.
Header + desktop sidebar + mobile bottom-nav + drawer, all with safe-area-inset support.
Direct browser fetch with dangerous-direct-browser-access header; AnthropicError mapping for 0/400/401/429.
Programmatic SVG → PNG via sharp; 192/512/512-maskable + apple-touch-icon + favicon.svg.
All 11 modules; ~1200 LOC of authored banking content.
Crumb + title + summary + scenario + vocabulary + concepts + exercises + self-check + leadership + notes.
System + user editors; model/temp/max_tokens; live or simulated; per-run history capped 12 entries.
Key in/out + test key against api.anthropic.com + defaults + danger-zone full reset.
Auto-builds Markdown brief from notes + latest run per module; optional Claude refinement; download as .md.
53/53 pass: 47 curriculum invariants, 3 anthropic-client URL/header/refusal tests, 3 state tests.
Production bundle 376 KB JS / 119 KB gzipped, well under 500 KB gzipped budget. Playwright preview test clean.
Curriculum, BYO-key explanation, install steps, deploy steps, methodology pointer to docs/skill-chain/.
1seansean1/helm public repo + Actions workflow + Pages enabled. Live at https://1seansean1.github.io/helm/.
S3 bucket helm-1seansean1 (us-east-1) + public-read policy + website hosting. Live at http://helm-1seansean1.s3-website-us-east-1.amazonaws.com/.
Playwright loaded both URLs, deep-linked to a module, fired the Simulated exercise — response rendered. 0 errors / 0 warnings post-fix.

requirements_changes.rationale: Operator's UI quality memory required explicit non-terminal aesthetic guarantee; added as a verifiable requirement during requirements pass.

tech_debt.item: Account-level S3 BlockPublicPolicy disabled to allow the public bucket policy; BlockPublicAcls and IgnorePublicAcls remain enabled. Long-term move is CloudFront + OAC to restore the account default.
No HTTPS on the S3 website endpoint (HTTP only). Acceptable for a static demo with no auth surface; CloudFront would solve.
No component tests for ExerciseRunner / LeadershipPage UI flows yet (only smoke-tested via Playwright). Add @testing-library/react before any UI refactor.
Curriculum content not yet reviewed by a domain expert (working banking PM). Plan: one round of friend's feedback after she's worked through it.

completion_assessment: Walking demo (R1) complete: all 11 modules navigable, BYO-key live integration wired, install-as-PWA verified, deployed to both GitHub Pages and AWS commercial. 18/18 requirements verified. No planned units outstanding.
